# Manus

> AI Registry entry [AIR-27](https://linear.app/janusd/issue/AIR-27/manus) — status **Rejected** as of 2026-04-22. Departments: —.

**Category:** AI Agent Platform / Autonomous Web Agent
**Status:** REJECTED
**Cost:** Free limited; $39 Plus; $199 Pro; Custom Enterprise
**Entity:** Butterfly Effect (Chinese AI startup)

## Overview

Autonomous AI agent platform. Gained attention early 2025 as one of first general-purpose AI agents capable of independently performing multi-step web tasks — browsing sites, filling forms, gathering data, writing reports, executing complex research workflows.

## Capabilities

* Autonomous task execution
* Web browsing and interaction
* Research and analysis
* Document creation
* Multi-step planning
* Real-time execution visibility
* Code execution

## Rejection Rationale

* **Chinese headquarters** — data may be subject to Chinese regulations; §5.2.3 likely restricts use with internal/sensitive data
* **No enterprise certifications** — no SOC 2, ISO 27001, GDPR
* **No SSO** — fails Microsoft Entra requirement (Action #21)
* **Agent autonomy risk** — autonomous web agent on user's behalf raises governance questions
* **Credential handling concerns**
* **[[claude-code|Claude Code]] + [[claude|Claude]] MCP** provides many agentic capabilities with better security

*Rejected.*
